subtitle.client: Pick a Worker, post a job, or follow up on applicants — your hire-ready dashboard is below.
subtitle.worker: New jobs in your trade, your active applications, and your network — everything in one scroll.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: New applicants, messages, reviews, and signals from your network.

empty.title: You're all caught up
empty.description: When someone applies to your job, sends you a message, leaves a review, or accepts your connection — it'll show up here.

subtitle.client: Post a job, review applicants, and pick the Worker that fits. You can manage every job's status from its detail page.
subtitle.worker: Browse open jobs from Clients, apply with one click, and track what you've put your name on.

browse.title: No open jobs right now
browse.descClient: Nobody else has posted a job here yet — be the first to put one up.
browse.descWorker: Check back soon. New jobs land here as Clients post them.

applications.title: You haven't applied to anything yet
applications.description: When you apply to a job, it lands here so you can track and withdraw if plans change.

mine.title: You haven't posted a job yet
mine.description: Post one and Workers in your area can apply. You'll see them all in one place when they do.

noApplicants.title: No applicants yet
noApplicants.description: As Workers apply, they'll appear here with a link to their profile and a Message button.

confirm.deleteJob: Delete this job post? This can't be undone.
confirm.hireWorker: Hire {{name}} for this job? Other applicants will be notified the position is filled.
